$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/styles.title: $:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/styles
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/styles.creator: pepito

$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/encryp.title: $:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/encrypttiddler.js
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/encryp.creator: Danielo

$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/crypt-.text:
<$transclude tiddler="$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/openPopup"/> <$encryptTiddler passwordTiddler="$:/temp/password"><$reveal state="$:/state/encrypt" type="match" text={{!!title}} animate="yes">
<$edit-text tiddler="$:/temp/password" tag="input" type="password" default="" placeholder="password" class="tw-edit-texteditor"/> <$list filter="[is[current]!has[encrypted]]"> <$button message="tw-encrypt-tiddler" set="$:/state/encrypt" setTo="" class="">Encrypt<$list filter="[is[current]has[encrypted]]"> <$button message="tw-decrypt-tiddler" set="$:/state/encrypt" setTo="" class="">Decrypt
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/crypt-.title: $:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/crypt-button
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/crypt-.creator: Danielo

$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/openPo.text: <$reveal state="$:/state/encrypt" type="nomatch" text={{!!title}} animate="no"><$button set="$:/state/encrypt" setTo={{!!title}} class="btn-invisible">{{$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/unlocked}}</$button></$reveal><$reveal state="$:/state/encrypt" type="match" text={{!!title}} animate="no"><$button set="$:/state/encrypt" setTo="" class="btn-invisible">{{$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/unlocked}}</$button></$reveal>
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/openPo.title: $:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/openPopup
$:/plugins/danielo/encryptTiddler/openPo.creator: Danielo
